1.title: Sql - Polling - Time
1.query:
timeseries time = avg(dt.sfm.datasource.sql.polling.time)
| sort arrayAvg(time) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Wmi - Connect - Failed
2.query:
timeseries failed = avg(dt.sfm.datasource.wmi.connect.failed)
| sort arrayAvg(failed) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Wmi - Event - Event - Count
3.query:
timeseries count = avg(dt.sfm.datasource.wmi.event.event.count)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Wmi - Event - Log - Query - Count
4.query:

| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Wmi - Event - Log - Query - Failed
5.query:

| sort arrayAvg(failed) desc
| limit 20

| limit 20
